findings.finding: The transfer task creates a realistic constraint with the forty-minute shared peer session. While the model response effectively coordinates the individual retrieval and feedback phases within that time, it would be beneficial to explicitly mention a fallback strategy if the forty minutes expire before all peers have completed the criterion-based comparison, ensuring no learner misses critical recovery guidance.
findings.resolution: Consider adding a brief note in the model response about fallback strategies, such as sharing written criteria asynchronously if time runs out.

limitations: Did not perform full accessibility or rights compliance check, per role isolation.
Did not evaluate domain-specific accuracy outside of the provided instructional context.
